# GPC — Google Play Console CLI

> Ship Android apps from your terminal. The complete CLI for Google Play Developer API v3.

GPC is a TypeScript CLI that covers 187 Google Play Developer API endpoints. It handles releases, rollouts, metadata, vitals, reviews, subscriptions, in-app products, purchases, reports, users, testers, and more — from one tool.

## Key Facts

- Language: TypeScript (ESM, strict mode)
- Runtime: Node.js 20+ or standalone binary (Bun-compiled)
- Install: `npm install -g @gpc-cli/cli`
- Auth: Service account JSON, OAuth 2.0, Application Default Credentials
- Output: JSON (default in CI/pipe), table (default in TTY), YAML, Markdown
- Exit codes: 0 success, 1 error, 2 usage, 3 auth, 4 API, 5 network, 6 threshold breach, 10 plugin
- Config: `.gpcrc.json` (project), `~/.config/gpc/config.json` (user), `GPC_*` env vars
- Uploads: Resumable protocol (8 MB chunks, auto-resume on failure, real-time progress bar)
- Tests: 1,694 total, 90%+ line coverage on all core packages
- Version: 0.9.39 (pre-release series → 1.0.0 public launch)
- License: MIT

## Documentation

- Guide: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/guide/

- Exit Codes: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/reference/exit-codes

- SDK Usage: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/advanced/sdk-usage

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/yasserstudio/gpc
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gpc-cli/cli
- License: MIT
- Full LLM reference: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/llms-full.txt

## Common Commands

```
gpc auth login --service-account key.json              # Authenticate
gpc doctor                                             # Diagnose setup problems
gpc status                                             # App health: releases + vitals + reviews
gpc releases upload app.aab --track internal           # Upload AAB to internal track
gpc releases promote --from internal --to production --rollout 10  # Promote with staged rollout
gpc releases rollout increase --track production --rollout 50      # Increase rollout
gpc vitals crashes --threshold 2.0                     # CI gate on crash rate (exit 6 if breached)
gpc vitals anr --threshold 0.5                         # CI gate on ANR rate
gpc listings pull --dir metadata/                      # Download store listings
gpc listings push --dir metadata/                      # Upload store listings
gpc reviews list --stars 1-3 --since 7d                # Recent low-rated reviews
gpc reviews reply --review-id <id> --text "Thanks"     # Reply to a review
gpc subscriptions list                                 # List subscriptions
gpc purchases get <token>                              # Verify a purchase token
gpc pricing convert --from USD --amount 9.99           # Regional price conversion
gpc reports download financial --month 2026-02         # Download financial report
gpc users invite user@example.com --developer-id <id> --role ADMIN  # Invite user
gpc testers import --track beta --file testers.csv     # Bulk tester import
gpc publish app.aab --track beta --notes "Bug fixes"   # End-to-end release
gpc anomalies list                                     # List Android vitals anomalies
gpc migrate fastlane --dir fastlane/metadata           # Migrate Fastlane metadata
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Default |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT | Service account JSON string or file path | — |
| GPC_APP | Default package name | — |
| GPC_PROFILE | Auth profile name | — |
| GPC_DEVELOPER_ID | Developer account ID (user/tester management) | — |
| GPC_OUTPUT | Output format (table, json, yaml, markdown) | auto |
| GPC_NO_COLOR | Disable color output | — |
| GPC_NO_INTERACTIVE | Disable prompts (auto in CI) | — |
| GPC_MAX_RETRIES | Max retry attempts | 3 |
| GPC_TIMEOUT | Request timeout (ms) | 30000 |
| GPC_DEBUG | Enable debug logging | — |
| GPC_CA_CERT | Custom CA certificate path | — |
| HTTPS_PROXY | HTTP proxy URL | — |

## Exit Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 0 | Success |
| 1 | General error |
| 2 | Usage / bad arguments |
| 3 | Auth failure |
| 4 | Google Play API error |
| 5 | Network error |
| 6 | Vitals threshold breached (CI gate) |
| 10 | Plugin error |

## Packages (Monorepo)

| Package | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| @gpc-cli/cli | CLI entry point (bin: gpc) |
| @gpc-cli/core | Business logic, command orchestration |
| @gpc-cli/api | Typed Google Play API client (187 endpoints) |
| @gpc-cli/auth | Authentication: service account, OAuth, ADC |
| @gpc-cli/config | Config loading, env vars, profiles |
| @gpc-cli/plugin-sdk | Plugin interface and lifecycle hooks |
| @gpc-cli/plugin-ci | CI/CD helpers |
